For more on Yuan Chunming  (原春鸣) 

Associate Professor of Art / Oil Painting Artist

Graduated from The Oil painting Department of Xi 'an Academy of Fine Arts. 

Now she is an Associate Professor of Art College of Ankang University. 

She was a visiting scholar of The University of Bolton in 2017 and a key young visiting scholar of The Central Academy of Fine Arts from 2012 to 2013. She graduated from the Theory and Criticism class of Contemporary Fine Arts of the Central Academy of Fine Arts in 2012. 

She was awarded the second Special Seminar on Oil Painting Materials of the Central Academy of Fine Arts from 2008 to 2009.  Her works have been selected for many domestic and foreign painting exhibitions and won awards, and many of them have been collected by private collectors. She has published a number of painting works and academic
articles and monographs " Chunming Yuan works collection", co-authored "Investigation of Southern Shaanxi Folk Culture" and edited "Oil Painting Creation Course". Now She is the director of Ankang Artists Association, deputy director of Oil painting Art Committee of Ankang Artists Association, member of Shaanxi Artists Association, researcher of Shaanxi watercolour powder Painting Society, vice president of Shaanxi Freehand painting Society, member of the organizing

snippet.title: Meet Chinese Oil Painter Gao Yuanyuan 高圆圆 (FENIX360 Interview)
snippet.description:
Built on blockchain technology, the FENIX360 app is the ultimate showcase and marketplace app for creators, performers, and fans.  Create NFTs and more.  Sign up on the app or on the web at https://web.fenix.cash/register. Follow us on IG @fenix360_net.

For more on Gao Yuanyuan (高圆圆) 

Gao Yuanyuan, graduated from Xi'an Academy of Fine Arts in 2007. 

A person of independent personality with strong autonomy and thinking.  

She is low profile. Her artistic style is extremely fiery and unrestrained, open atmosphere.

Since 2008, she has been living in Songzhuang as a professional artist. Songzhuang is the most famous artist village in Beijing with 2000 residents. 

Over the years, she has devoted herself to exploring and advancing her artistic creation, drawing a lot of abstract oil paintings. Her artistic language is becoming more and more profound and rich, and her depiction of the spiritual world is becoming clearer and higher; her style moves people's hearts.

She looks upon painting as a need for inner emotional expression. In her understanding , any art is just a form of expression, it has its own language, and language needs to be learned. Art itself is a container, and the size and quality of the container need to be completed by the artist himself.

It requires inborn talent,  learning, thinking, and practice. Her thinking and experiments on abstract painting have continued since graduated from college, and her thinking has gone from vague to clear. As an oriental person, there is always a lingering oriental complex in the bones, from the creative technique to the spiritual connotation, it has been profoundly affecting the formation of the picture. The reason why she focuses on abstract creation is because it is  in line with her  spiritual expression needs. The space for abstract expression is free and broad. In the process of creation, there is often a surprise of being in an unknown space, as if you have set up a maze, you can swim and think to your heart's content.

When an artist perfects her artistic language, she is also perfecting herself. Such perfection requires time, experience, and understanding. she just wants to settle down, know herself, recognize life, and do pure artistic expression.


###

snippet.title: Meet Chinese Poet & Artist Zong Tingfeng 宗霆锋 (FENIX360 Interview)
snippet.description:
Built on blockchain technology, the FENIX360 app is the ultimate showcase and marketplace app for creators, performers, and fans.  Create NFTs and more.  Sign up on the app or on the web at https://web.fenix.cash/register. Follow us on IG @fenix360_net.

For more on Zong Tingfeng  (宗霆锋)

Born in 1968 in Wuqi County, Shaanxi Province.

Graduated from Xi'an Academy of Fine Arts in 1992 , majored in printmaking.

He began to write poetry during his college days. He has published poetry collections " A hawthorn tree that slows down and deepens ", "Selected Poems of Zong Tingfeng", and a collection of paintings and theories "Poetic Painting". "The Collection of Food Mulberry", "Passion and Fear", "The Sharp Red of the Sun", "Praying Cow Goes to the Golden Haystack", "Fantasy Lucena", "Fable of Auspicious Village", "The Lamp God", The Flock of Birds Flying and other poems include short poems, long poems, poetic dramas, and compound writing styles.

In 2006, he attended the 22nd "Youth Poetry Society" of the Chinese Writers Association.

In 2007, the world's first electronic poetry collection "Pocket Labyrinth" was released through Toshiba SD card.

In 2008, he published a collection of poems, " A hawthorn tree that slows down and deepens " (Taibai Literature and Art Publishing House).

In May 2008, he attended the Poetry Symposium on "The Marginal Destiny of Chinese Contemporary Poetry and Its Personal Mission" hosted by the Institute of Cultural Criticism of Tongji University in Shanghai and the School of Humanities of Tongji University. The initiator and host of the conference, Professor Zhu Dake, a well-known contemporary cultural critic, spoke highly of his   creations and believed that he is one of the most important poets in China after Haizi ( Pen name of a very famous Mainland China poet Zha Haisheng after the Cultural Revolution l ) "

In 2010, he joined the Woodpecker Science Group, engaged in literary writing, painting theoretical research and creation.

In 2013, he published the theoretical research on personal painting and the album "Poetic Painting".

In 2014, he published the poetry collection Zong Tingfeng's Selected Poems (Huacheng Publishing House).

Now living in Songzhuang, engaged in literature, art creation and related activities. Songzhuang  is an artist village and is the biggest and most famous artist community in  Beijing with 2000 artist residents

snippet.title: Meet FENIX360 Advisor James Lee (李培勤) (FENIX360 Interview)
snippet.description:
Built on blockchain technology, the FENIX360 app is the ultimate showcase and marketplace app for creators, performers, and fans. Create NFTs and more. Sign up on the app or on the web at https://web.fenix.cash/register. Follow us on IG @fenix360_net

For more on James Lee (李培勤)

Fenix Chief Advisor (Capita Market and Fund Raising)  

Armed with more than 25 years working experience in the China market, has built up extensive networks and resources in both the corporate world and investment communities particularly in Singapore and China.  With his connections, he has assisted many Chinese companies in their fund-raising exercises, internationalization, overseas listings and served as advisor to many of them. He will advise Fenix in all joint venture, Merger, and acquisition, listing and fundraising matters.


Graduated from University of Singapore, with bachelor’s degree in the Electrical Engineering Faculty in 1980. He is a veteran in China since 1992

1980-1993       1st Job after graduation as an Engineer at Singapore Telecom and risen all the way to Department Manager and as Country Director (China) for Singapore Telecom International (STI), an Investment Arm of Singtel Group for overseas markets, and represented Singtel to take part in the consortium for the selection of Suzhou Industrial Park in China.

1994-1999    Strategic Planning Director, Motorola China and GM for Joint Venture Development in China.

1999-2000      JV Strategic Planning Director for 3Com Asia Pacific (Hong Kong)

2000-2002     VP and GM (China) of Vertex Investment Venture, the VC armed of Temasek Group, and was ranked the 3rd most active VC in China in Year 2011

2002-2005 China Chief Representative of Singapore Economic Development Board mainly to assist Chinese companies to internationalize its business through setting up offices and Regional HQs in Singapore including listing at the Stock Exchange of Singapore

2005-2007 Investment Consultant (China) to Government of Singapore Investment Corporation under the Direct Investment Group

2007 till now Managing Director, Sinolion Capital Group, A Boutique Investment and Consultancy Company that focuses on corporate M&A activities, both direct investments and properties investments in China and as a Managing Partner to China Bridge Capital, a large scale fund management company having its HQ in Beijing

Of late, he has just been appointed as the Independent Director of Gome Fintech listed at the Hong Kong Stock Exchange.

snippet.title: Winter Olympics: Western Reporters Compete for Gold in Fear-Mongering
snippet.description:
The 2022 Winter Olympics in Beijing is here but the U.S. isn’t sending its officials, calling it a “diplomatic boycott.” Meanwhile, host outlet NBC is using every opportunity to bash China and Russia throughout their coverage. 

Tings Chak, Shanghai-based researcher at the Tricontinental Institute & a member of Dongsheng News collective, explains what the perception of the Olympics has been in China, analyzes the treatment of Eileen Gu, and reacts to the Western coverage. 

22-year-old Amir Locke was shot to death by police in the early morning in his apartment in Minneapolis earlier this month, and protests have erupted nationwide. Mayor Jacob Frey held a press conference and activist and civil rights attorney Nekima Levy Armstrong interrupted with demands from the community. She and Michelle Gross, president of Communities Against Police Brutality, join the show to discuss the horrendous murder and the community’s reaction.

Ottawa truckers have been blocking roads, airports, and border crossings from the U.S. to Canada to protest coronavirus restrictions and vaccine requirements. Despite the many illegal activities associated with the right-wing protests, they have not been attacked or sabotaged by police – in stark contrast to the many Indigenous protests over access to ancestral land and water. Q. Anthony Omene, columnist for The Globe and Mail & co-host of TheKulture.TV, joins The Freedom Side to explain more about what’s going on.

The United States continues to escalate rhetoric and pressure against Russia, now making plans for the evacuation of Americans in Ukraine if Russia invades. But Ukrainian President Zelensky thinks an invasion is “unlikely.” Brian Becker, host of The Socialist Program & National Director of ANSWER Coalition, discusses the imperialist politics at play.

Maryland residents represented their enslaved ancestors in court recently, arguing that the Moses Cemetery in Bethesda, Maryland, where their ancestors lie, should be able to remain a protected burial ground. Without legal standing while they lived, this is the first time these African ancestors have ever had their interests expressed in court. Dr. Marsha Coleman-Adebayo, co-founder of Bethesda African Cemetery Coalition and award-winning longtime scholar and organizer, joins the show.

Tyson Foods has more than doubled their profit this quarter – to $1.12 billion – by raising prices far higher than the wage increases workers have demanded and won. But with four meat packing companies, including Tyson, controlling the majority of the industry, ranchers and labor organizations are accusing the corporations of price fixing – with workers and families footing the bill. Claire Kelloway, food systems program manager at the Open Markets Institute & primary reporter for Food & Power, joins the show to explain how these monopolies operate.

But with four meat packing companies, including Tyson, controlling the majority of the industry, ranchers and labor organizations are accusing the corporations of price fixing – with workers and families footing the bill. Claire Kelloway, food systems program manager at the Open Markets Institute & primary reporter for Food & Power, joins the show to explain how these monopolies operate.

snippet.title: Rapid transformation? Yang Zi's new play and Chen Xiao play the role of a psychologist again, net pr
snippet.description: The queen of ratings Yang Zi's previous immortal drama masterpiece "sink fragrance like crumbs - sink fragrance heavy China", the ratings exploded but the evaluation polarized, it is reported that Yang Zi also wants to jump off the image of anxious transformation. Recently, it was rumored that her new play will be paired with "Meng Hua Lu" Chen Xiao, starring in the modern drama "Light and Bright", after the news spread, many fans are looking forward to the sparks that will be generated by their strong team. The company's main goal is to provide the best possible service to its customers. The type of drama she is known for, such as the ancient immortal drama "fragrant honey sinking ashes like frost", sweet love drama "more guidance for the rest of your life" are all big hits, but the "female psychologist", which is considered a transformation masterpiece, has not reached the peak of her previous works in terms of word-of-mouth and ratings response. It is widely rumored that Yang Zi will join forces with Chen Xiao to take over the role of "Lights On", a drama about a senior psychologist who has returned from studying abroad, joining forces with a number of other psychologists to help various characters of all shapes and sizes to regain a good life. It is reported that the "lights are on" executive producer is acting but excellent director Er Dongsheng, his directing style is delicate and layered, and will certainly greatly enhance the quality of the drama. From the point of view of the plot, the "lights are on" and Yang Zi's transformation masterpiece "female psychologist" is very similar, but the former is a psychologist-based group drama, while the latter focuses only on the heroine HeDun a psychologist. The fans are also looking forward to this, think Yang Zi in the "female psychologist" played a similar role, this time in the "lights" again challenge to play the psychologist, certainly handy. The net rumor is that the male lead has been set down Chen Xiao, his acting skills in the past few years, from the "that year flowering moon" Shen Xingyi to the "dream of China" Gu Qianfan, and then to the "ice rain and fire" in the Wu Zhenfeng, not only face resistance, strength is also evident to all, the selection of the script is also known for caution. This time Yang Zi is in a hurry to shoot the new drama "Changxiang Si", the set photos out, almost all get praise. However, there are also fans who believe that although the current quality of "Changxiang Si" is not bad, but the male actors who work with Yang Zi, the curiosity is obviously lower, feel a little pity. Therefore, many fans hope that the rumor of Yang Zi and Chen Xiao pairing is true, because they are both popular and acting skills of the first-line great, if the two strong team, will certainly bring a lot of exciting and interesting points to watch.

snippet.title: Meet Singaporean Nanyin Composer Wu Qiren 吴启仁 (FENIX360 Interview)
snippet.description:
Built on blockchain technology, the FENIX360 app is the ultimate showcase and marketplace app for creators, performers, and fans.  Create NFTs and more.  Sign up on the app or on the web at https://web.fenix.cash/register. Follow us on IG @fenix360_net.

For more on Wu Qiren (吴启仁)

Singapore's Nanyin composer, professional  composer of Fujian Liyuan Opera Experimental Troupe. 

"Nanyin" music is a thousand-year-old traditional music in China. Originated from ancient Chinese Han and Tang Dynasties, formed in Song and Yuan Dynasties, and flourished in Ming and Qing Dynasties. 

As an influential composer of Nanyin music, his Liyuan Opera works are traditional operas with Nanyin music, and he has participated in various artistic creation activities at the national and provincial levels for many times. 

His masterpieces "Cai Wenji" and "Chen Zhongzi" won the Excellent Music Award of Fujian Opera Performance; "Dong Sheng and Li Shi" and "Virtue Woman Yin", which he participated in composing, won the National Stage Excellent Project Award in 2004 and 2006 respectively.

These two plays have also been designated by the Singapore Ministry of Culture of the State Council as the shooting plan of the 2011 drama digital film. 

Since 2014, it has toured in European countries as a key play of cultural exchange between China and France.  

In recent years, he has successively created many works for "Royal Stele Pavilion" and "Li Shishi" in Liyuan Opera, "Li Guangdi" in Gaojia Opera and "Ode to Haisi Navigation Mark" in South Music Group, all of which have won national and provincial awards. 

In 2018, the music of Chen Zhongzi, which was re-created for Fujian Liyuan Opera Troupe, won the first prize of music creation in the 7th Fujian Art Festival. 

His works have also often presented at the "World Music" Music Festival. 

In 2014, he served as the leader of the Singapore delegation to attend the World Music Festival hosted by the United Nations Tourism Administration in the ancient city of Xi'an, China. 

As a leading figure in the field of Nanyin composition, he cultivated a new generation of young Nanyin musicians, combining Chinese traditional millennium ancient music with modern pop music elements, and injecting new life into Chinese traditional culture.

snippet.title: The roles were changed, Yang Zi wanted to play because the investor's daughter wanted to play it
snippet.description: A TV series shot to half, temporarily be replaced, whether the crew or investors will have cost losses, so generally determine which actors involved, after the start of shooting will rarely be changed, unless the investor to install some people in, or the actor's problems had to be changed. The new version of the TV series "Ode to Joy" was officially announced by Jiang Shu Ying, Zhang Jianing, Zhang Huiwen, Yang Caiyu and Sun Qian as the five beauties, whether it was the opening ceremony or the Tencent ceremony, Sun Qian is very active with the crew publicity, the Dragon Boat Festival last year, there is still Sun Qian's figure in the promotional video, but in September, her role was changed to Li Hao Fei played. Who is Li Haofei? It was the girl who was standing in for Xie Na in "Fast Forward" at the time, but she was always trolled by the audience. But then again, Sun Qiandu shot more than a month before being replaced, in the "I am an actor" Li Chengru once said, in the film and television industry is not easy to change the actor, because changing the actor is equivalent to starting from scratch, each day the consumption costs are in the hundreds of thousands to over a million. Hou Hongliang has mentioned that noon to change the role of words, perhaps because the actor played after the inappropriate, and previously thought of the situation is not the same, and then we discuss together whether to change the actors, after discussing the decision to change. Like Yang Zi shoot noon "war Changsha", initially this role is not played by her, but the previous actress can not play, so Yang Zi top. Yang Zi is actually worried about being replaced, but, fortunately, her acting skills are over the top, so she stays. There is also, "The Great River" was originally announced Jin Chen play the female lead Liang Sishen, Jin Chen also in the microblogging team with the publicity, but a few days later, the Great River official microblogging official announcement of the female lead changed Yang Caiyu, as to why changed, the answer is always that it is not suitable. Yang Zi has also spoken in interviews about her bitter experience of having her role changed. At that time, the play has been shot to half, one day the assistant director said to her, the investor's daughter wants to play her role, you pack up and leave. If we say that we can not fight the capital is also helpless, but if you offend people in the crew is also to be replaced at any time. Like Er Dongsheng in the early years of a drama, the male lead is him, but because of offending the female lead he was replaced. The same experience also Liu Yijun. In his sophomore year, Liu Yijun took the movie "Falling Mountain Wind" halfway through the shoot, the director told him, you offend people, do not have to come over to shoot. For several years, Liu Yijun had nothing to do but to copy the payroll at the Xi'an Film Studio. There are many reasons for being replaced, from the actor's original problem to the capital side or the crew's aspect, but it must be said that the replacement of the actor is quite a big blow. What do you think?

WANG YIBO ENGSUB 2022/02/22:  Jay Chou praised Leehom Wang's ins for praising Wang Yibo, it turns out that the two of them worked together.  Today, Wang Leehom posted on ins, saying: "Sing with Wang Yibo, this child is incredible!" Then,  Jay Chou and Chen Jianzhou also liked this dynamic, many people wondered,  Did Jay Chou work with Wang Yibo? That's right,  Jay Chou and Wang Yibo filmed a micro-movie of Pechoin together,  Wang Yibo once said that he likes the songs of Jay Chou and Leehom Wang,  Now it seems that Wang Yibo is really a "bar handle" in the world of chasing stars.  In fact, on New Year's Eve, Leehom Wang praised Wang Yibo in a backstage interview.  He said: "As soon as he (Wang Yibo) came out, the audience was boiling.  I believe this is the climax of the day. "It is indeed as Wang Leehom said,  Their cooperation stage "Descendants of the Dragon" won the highest ratings of the night.  Wang Yibo has come this way, although outside netizens have mixed comments on him,  I like it, I hate it if I don't.  There are even false alarms.  But the industry's predecessors have always praised him.  "He has talent."  Wang Yibo and Chen Xiao's anti-drug film "Ice Rain and Fire",  Many people questioned whether Wang Yibo could afford this role.  And Chen Xiao, who played opposite him, commented on him that "he is enough,  He's strong enough to really surprise everyone. snippet.title: Meet Singapore Violinist Wang Lina (王丽娜)! (FENIX360 Interview)
snippet.description:
Built on blockchain technology, the FENIX360 app is the ultimate showcase and marketplace app for creators, performers, and fans. Create NFTs and more. Sign up on the app or on the web at https://web.fenix.cash/register. Follow us on IG @fenix360_net

For more on Wang Lina ( 王丽娜)

Musician (proficient in violin, electronic violin, piano, music theory and popular vocal music)

She is a young musician who is proficient in violin, electronic violin, piano, music theory and popular vocal music. She started practicing violin from a young age and at the age 13, she admitted as top student to study in Shenyang Conservatory of Music in Northeast China. She served as Principal Second Violinist in the Youth Symphony of Orchestra of the Conservatory of Music.

In 1998 at the Korean International Music Festival, she has successfully performed the Symphony Orchestra called the “New World”. After graduating from the University in 1999, she enrolled at Chengdu Academy of Music in Sichuan, China for her violin graduate study. She studied piano lessons in her spare time.

In 2003, she was awarded the Second Position in the “Deyi Shungxin” Cup  Competition for Young Musicians (playing the electronic violin) and invited to perform in the New Year’s Day Gala in Liaoning, China.

In 2004, she went to Germany to study her violin master class. After that, she assumed the position of Opera Director at the Shenzhen China opera troupe and led the “Match Girl” crew for the All China performance tour.

In 2010, she came to Singapore to conduct music education and taught professional diploma candidates, a number of her students obtained outstanding results in the ABRSM examinations.

In 2011, she followed Dr. Zhang Fan for pop music studies and obtained an IMAA Advanced Diploma in 2013.

From 2011 until present day, she actively involved in the charity performance like the St. John Ambulance, Thong Chai Medical Institution, Sian Chay Medical Institution and others Institution. She also involved in the Orchestra performance like the Singapore Philharmonic Orchestra performance and Musicians Association and others Orchestra group as well. She had also been invited to perform at Singapore River Hong Bao for 2021 & 2022. 

In 2021, she founded her own music academy "Lina Music Studio" to inherit music education.

###

snippet.title: Meet Renowned Singaporean Singer Zac Zhang 张雄 (FENIX360 Interview)
snippet.description:
Built on blockchain technology, the FENIX360 app is the ultimate showcase and marketplace app for creators, performers, and fans.  Create NFTs and more.  Sign up on the app or on the web at https://web.fenix.cash/register. Follow us on IG @fenix360_net.

For more on Zac Zhang (张雄) 

Acclaimed Music Performer, Host and Producer in Asia 
He has the title of “Singer King of Singapore Treasure Island ". He is deeply loved by audiences from all over the world for singing classic nostalgic Chinese popular songs. He was taught by Marcus Chin, our Fenix360 Global Artist Ambassador and President of the Singapore Artists Association whose singing experience has spread throughout Singapore, Malaysia, Indonesia, and China. 

He is a professional host who has hosted many large-scale varieties shows.  

In 2014 he represented Singapore to participate in the Xi'an, China “Silk Road World Music Festival 2014" as a guest performer. 

In 2015 as the host and singing guest of the China Peony Cup International Arts Festival .

He was also invited to perform at the Singapore National Chinese Orchestra on the annual Chinese blockbuster program "Spring to the River".

In 2021, he was invited to the "Esplanade Art Centre", a national key cultural benchmark in Singapore, to hold a solo concert "Treasure Island Song King Golden Song Reproduction".

He was mentored by Dr Ken Chang, Fenix360 Advisor and the father of Xinyao (a contemporary Mandarin vocal genre that emerged and rose to fame in Singapore between the late 1970s to 1980 , )studied pop vocal music and pop music art ratings. He obtained a Diploma in Popular Music Master Diploma from the International Union of Music Critics. 

In 2012 onwards, he has begun to stay behind the scenes of stage performances and set up his own production company "WIZ MEDIA PRODUCTION".

He has planned countless community performances, concerts, company annual dinners, and also produced records.

He also collaborated with the Ministry of Communications, Press and The Arts of Singapore on an online programme in support of Singapore's greenery development plan. 

During the covid pandemic, he and his mentor Marcus Chin set up Marcus Live Studio for the transformation of concert performances to live streaming market.  

To date , they have conducted more than 300 live streaming shows, and in collaboration with Singapore Federation of Trade Unions few hundred live streaming talents had learned the skills from their social media Live Workshop. 

###

For more on WILL NUNZIATA visit https://www.WillNunziata.com

snippet.title: Meet Acclaimed Poet, Writer, Painter Shen Yiran 沈依然! (FENIX360 Interview)
snippet.description:
Built on blockchain technology, the FENIX360 app is the ultimate showcase and marketplace app for creators, performers, and fans. Create NFTs and more. Sign up on the app or on the web at https://web.fenix.cash/register. Follow us on IG @fenix360_net

For more on Shen Yiran (沈依然):

Born in Ma Anshan, Anhui Province in 1979, . After resigning as a doctor, she worked in Southern Metropolis Daily and The Beijing News. 
Currently living in Beijing and becomes a full-time writer and painter.
In 2003, she began to write novels and poetries. Her works were published in the Lotus, Literature, Red Bean and other literary journals for many times.
In 2013, she settled in Song zhuang, Beijing, and wrote poetries and novels. At the same time, she engaged in ink paintings and oil paintings. 
In 2015, she published the novel Insomnia in the Dream of Life.
In 2016, She published her poetry anthology happy as a Bird. 
In 2016,   successfully held her personal exhibition "Illusion • Life Dream"  @ Songzhuang Tongze Art Museum
From 2017 to 2018, She held her solo exhibition "Vision • Four Seasons" and participated in several group exhibitions at Hudson Arts Center, New York, USA. 
On October 13, 2018, She successfully held her solo exhibition "New Interpretation of Hieroglyphics" in China Greenland · China Brocade "Beijing Highest Art Space".
On April 13, 2019, She held her solo exhibition "Magic Square -- Flower of Family Name" in Tongze Art Museum, Songzhuang, China.

###

For more on Will Nunziata, visit https://www.willnunziata.com
